phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso principale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora apre oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è necessaria la prenotazione online, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, eh neh-ches-SAHR-ee-ah lah preh-noh-tah-TSYOH-neh on-LINE, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.intent_en: Ask what Villa Carlotta is famous for
phrases.text_local: Scusi, per cosa è famosa Villa Carlotta?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, per KOH-zah eh fah-MOH-zah VEE-lah kar-LOT-tah?
phrases.cultural_note: Villa Carlotta on Lake Como is renowned for its spectacular spring flowering of rhododendrons, azaleas and camellias.

responses.english: For its botanical garden and azaleas in spring.
responses.phonetic: per eel jar-DEE-noh boh-TAH-nee-koh eh leh ah-DZAH-leh-eh een pree-mah-VEH-rah.
responses.french: Per il giardino botanico e le azalee in primavera.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get there from Tremezzo
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si arriva a Villa Carlotta da Tremezzo?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see ar-REE-vah ah VEE-lah kar-LOT-tah dah treh-MEHT-tsoh?

responses.english: On foot, five minutes from Tremezzo pier.
responses.phonetic: ah PYEH-dee, eh ah CHEEN-kweh mee-NOO-tee dal MOH-loh dee treh-MEHT-tsoh.
responses.french: A piedi, è a cinque minuti dal molo di Tremezzo.
